scripts.validate: npm run validate:data && node scripts/generate-companies-md.mjs --check && node scripts/export-companies-csv.mjs --check && node scripts/validate-csv.mjs && node scripts/generate-data-quality-report.mjs --check && node scripts/generate-data-cleanup-plan.mjs --check && node scripts/validate-repo-paths.mjs && node scripts/validate-public-docs.mjs && node scripts/validate-site.mjs && node scripts/validate-domestic-site.mjs && python3 -m py_compile server/lead_api.py
scripts.serve: npm run build:site && python3 -m http.server 4178 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory dist
